title: androsace chamaejasme subsp. andersonii
intro: Androsace chamaejasme subsp. andersonii, also known as the alpine or rock jasmine, is a rare and unique flowering plant native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Androsace chamaejasme subsp. andersonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
